title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part 9 - The White Dwarf Issues (a)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SQdrkq_hBzE

Daniel (@dungeondive) ventures beyond the retail releases into the White Dwarf magazine content — where Warhammer Quest's true depth reveals itself. Games Workshop published additional warriors, scenarios, rules variants, and expansions through their house magazine, and this episode begins cataloguing them.

For many collectors, the White Dwarf content is where Warhammer Quest transforms from a great dungeon crawler into an obsession. These are the articles that dedicated fans have been photocopying, scanning, and sharing for decades. Daniel starts working through the stack.

----

Have you ever hunted down old magazine content to expand a game? What lengths did you go to?
